reviews.comment:
Si bien se expenden combustibles y lubricantes YPF es la sede Belgrano del Automóvil Club Argentino, para mí tiene más valor que YPF, la atención no es YPF es del ACA comprendido

(Translated by Google)
Although YPF sells fuel and lubricants, it's the Belgrano branch of the Argentine Automobile Club (ACA). For me, it has more value than YPF; the service isn't YPF, it's ACA-level service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bk51NkF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mi estación de servicio, cafetería, sanitario... Desde que estaba el histórico Ombú en el primer piso...

(Translated by Google)
My gas station, cafeteria, restroom... Ever since the historic Ombú tree was on the first floor...
